---
title: R Markdown Test
description: R Markdown Test
layout: default
output: pdf_document
---
This is a test of R Markdown.

\tableofcontents

# This is an h1

# This is an h2

# This is an h3

```{r}
plot(1:10)
```

```{python}
for i in range(100):
    if (i % 3 == 0 and i % 5 == 0):
        print("FizzBuzz")
    elif (i % 3 == 0):
        print("Fizz")
    elif (i % 5 == 0):
        print("Buzz")
    else:
        print(i)
```
